title: Health Canada’s organizational structure - Canada.ca
content:
## Health Canada’s organizational structure
Find information on Health Canada’s leaders and organizational branches.
- Branches and offices
Meet Health Canada’s leaders.

### The Honourable Marjorie Michel
Parliamentary Secretary to the Minister of Health

### Shalene Curtis-Micallef
Deputy Minister of Health Canada

## Branches and offices
Learn about the roles and responsibilities of each area of Health Canada's organization.
- Health Policy Branch
- Corporate Services Branch
- Chief Financial Officer Branch
- Digital Transformation Branch
- Office of Audit and Evaluation
- Health Products and Food Branch
- Pesticides Regulatory Directorate
- Communications and Public Affairs Branch
- Controlled Substances and Cannabis Branch
- Regulatory Operations and Enforcement Branch
- Healthy Environments and Consumer Safety Branch
Health Canada is a federal institution that is part of the Health Portfolio .
